svg.metadata: {"_description":"CI/CD pipeline: source → build → test → staging → prod, with rollback path.","type":"flow","title":"CI/CD pipeline","nodes":[{"id":"src","label":"git push","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"build","label":"build","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"unit","label":"unit tests","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"e2e","label":"e2e tests","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"stage","label":"staging deploy","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"smoke","label":"smoke tests","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"prod","label":"production","kind":"ellipse","accent":"accent"},{"id":"back","label":"rollback","kind":"note","background":"highlight"}],"edges":[{"from":"src","to":"build"},{"from":"build","to":"unit","label":"pass"},{"from":"unit","to":"e2e","label":"pass"},{"from":"e2e","to":"stage"},{"from":"stage","to":"smoke"},{"from":"smoke","to":"prod","label":"approve"},{"from":"prod","to":"back","label":"if broken","kind":"dashed"}]}
